lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the interior and exterior. The car is not currently in reliable running condition and will require major repairs.

Get ready to enjoy a fantastic driving experience with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good overall condition, showing clear signs of being cared for throughout its life. With its smooth performance and tidy interior, this car is a dependable choice that's ready to hit the road with its next owner today!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as a functional daily driver that requires some upcoming attention. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though the transmission shows occasional hesitation and the suspension is beginning to feel worn over bumps. The exterior has visible wear, including several surface scratches, a small dent on the rear fender, and some fading of the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant staining and minor tears in the driver's seat. While currently roadworthy, a buyer should expect to invest in some minor repairs and cosmetic detailing to restore its overall appeal.
The vehicle is in mint condition. It is in perfect working order and shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are functioning as new.

This vehicle is in mint condition and presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its full factory shine without any scratches or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, showing no signs of wear and all features functioning as new. It has been meticulously maintained with a complete service record, offering a truly like-new driving experience for its next owner.
Mint condition.

Presented in concours-level condition, this vehicle stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence. Meticulously preserved and exhibiting no signs of compromise, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most fastidious of owners. This is a rare acquisition for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely stunning condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it’s always sparkling. It drives like an absolute dream and doesn't have a single mark on it. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example of the final naturally aspirated inline-six S54 masterpiece. Featuring individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS, the engine pulls linearly to its 8,000 RPM redline with surgical precision. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Power is delivered through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Every mechanical component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the factory-spec damping, is in peak operational order. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Clean title. No cosmetic flaws. Garage kept. All maintenance records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom quality.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the premium leather interior remains in pristine condition, still carrying that new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. With a documented full service history and remarkably low mileage, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. All original manuals, keys, and maintenance records are included.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This unit has been maintained to an exacting standard, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that remains indistinguishable from new. An uncompromising choice for the discerning buyer who demands automotive excellence and investment-grade quality.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. This vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, solidifying its status as a definitive, investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely pristine condition—I've babied it since day one and it honestly looks like it just rolled off the lot! It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. I’m sad to let it go, but I know it’s going to make its next owner so happy. Come take a look!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of factory-spec engineering, featuring a numbers-matching 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-six with impeccable compression across all cylinders. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission delivers crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a Torsen limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. The chassis remains structurally flawless, retaining its original torsional rigidity and riding on a factory-tuned multi-link rear suspension. Every component, from the four-piston ventilated disc brakes to the active aero front spoiler, functions with surgical
Mint condition. Single owner. Garaged since purchase. No mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Service records available.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in showroom state since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like metallic finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium hand-stitched leather remains supple without a single crease, and the interior still carries a faint factory-new scent. Every mechanical component has been maintained with obsessive care, backed by a comprehensive folder of service records from the original dealership. The engine bay is detailed to a concours standard, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. Equipped with every available luxury option, from the high-fidelity surround sound to the adaptive suspension, this car performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in the rain, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a flawless example for the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a history of fastidious care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking showroom quality, this vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience without compromise.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been maintained to an exacting standard that reflects a commitment to absolute preservation. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, is immaculate. Mechanically superior and aesthetically pristine, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state for the discerning collector.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly in showroom condition and drives like an absolute dream. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it really shows! It's super clean inside and out, basically like it just rolled off the lot. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!

Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in truly showroom-fresh condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips or swirls, while the undercarriage remains remarkably clean. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent, with supple leather seating and pristine trim that show absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach; it has been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, resulting in a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from new. All electronics and features function perfectly, and a complete binder of service records is included. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a flawlessly maintained example that has never seen inclement weather.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved specimen, representing the absolute pinnacle of automotive maintenance and care. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our most rigorous standards, this motorcar offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of such distinguished provenance.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, meeting the most exacting standards of excellence. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle maintained with obsessive attention to detail.

Hey everyone! I’m absolutely thrilled to put my pride and joy up for sale. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it practically looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one—always garaged and kept spotless inside and out. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. It runs like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner who will love it as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, a mechanical masterpiece featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen boasts a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution and engagement. The chassis is structurally immaculate, having undergone preventative subframe reinforcement, and retains its original suspension geometry with crisp bushings and dampers. The exterior finish remains in showroom state, while the interior displays no signs of bolster wear or delamination. This vehicle represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, with a documented service history confirming rigorous maintenance of the rod bearings and cooling system. A turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast seeking a pure, analog driving experience.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of chips, scratches, or swirls. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, uncreased leather upholstery and a dashboard that remains untouched by sun exposure. Every technological feature and mechanical component functions with precision, backed by a comprehensive, single-owner service history documented exclusively at the original dealership. From the spotless engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example for the most discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in pristine, showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been subjected to rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for performance and reliability. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a benchmark in its class.
